message:
🐛 Fix demo mode: enable MSW for localStorage toggle and add missing handlers (#439)

- Check localStorage 'kc-demo-mode' in main.tsx to enable MSW when demo
  mode is toggled via UI (not just env var or netlify domain)
- Add resetBackendAvailabilityCache() to api.ts to clear stale cache when
  MSW starts, preventing "Backend unreachable" warnings
- Add missing mock handlers for demo mode:
  - /api/health - health check endpoint
  - /api/active-users - presence tracking
  - /api/permissions/summary - user permissions
  - /api/notifications/unread-count - notification badge
  - /api/dashboards - dashboard list (returns empty array)
  - /api/mcp/pods - pod list for cluster queries
  - /api/mcp/deployments - deployment list for cluster queries

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+  http.get('/api/health', async () => {
+    await delay(50)

+  // Active users (for presence tracking)
+  http.get('/api/active-users', async () => {
+    await delay(50)
+    return HttpResponse.json({ activeUsers: 1, totalConnections: 1 })

+  http.post('/api/active-users', async () => {
+    await delay(50)
+    return HttpResponse.json({ success: true })
+  }),

+  // Permissions
